verse_text: They also shall bring up a multitude against you to stone you with stones, and to strike you down with their swords.

links.context: Strip her naked: An act of humiliation preceding capital punishment of an adulteress ([[EZK.16:39]], [[EZK.16:40]]; Lv 20:10; [[DEU.22:22]]). Perhaps this means Israel would experience humiliation during the Assyrian exile, beginning in 722 BC.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
